title: Random's Wildlife
description: A simple wildlife mod that aims to add all kinds of new creatures from the real world to Minecraft.
body:
# Random's Wildlife
Have you ever wondered why Minecraft's "Wild" Update wasn't all that wild?

Well, now you can truly experience the wilderness of Minecraft!

This mod adds animals with realistic behaviors, textures, sounds, custom items and drops.
Please note, this is the Random Team's first mod so the quality of this mod may not be as high as you are used to. Thank you for trying out this mod!
## Animals
### Snake
The venomous snake will attack anyone who provokes it. Spawning in the desert, forest, and jungle, it has biome dependent textures.![The desert snake in it's natural habitat.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef90f20b083f137c2faf0b9fb070e7c0bc3518b3_0.webp)
### Butterfly
The ambient butterfly has ten variants to spice up the forests of your world.![The beautiful butterfly with a few variants showcased on screen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1efe3951a4577f8a25753904ee0716577a7de9d.png)
### Bear
The bear functions just like a vanilla polar bear, protecting it's babies. Don't get too close!![A bear and it's cub in the taiga.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9212f50ce7d4a59cefac6267ae6ce39b474ee6ba.png)
## Giraffe
The majestic giraffe spawns in the savanna at a height of almost 6 blocks. Try not to get trampled!
![The giraffe in it's natural habitat.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8934a82173dc04bc53e919e3ee945a4e0a320d5.png)
## Items
The unique thing about this mod is that each and every animal has a special item.

Current Items:
- Poison Dagger
- Butterfly Elytra
- Fur Carpet
- Tongue Potion, brewed with the tongue of a giraffe. Allows you to regenerate very quickly while sneaking.

Planned Features:
- Bear Head + Carpet
- Elephant
- Elephant Armor


More coming soon!
